params.name: Ship in a Bottle
params.source: Fragment Crafting (4%), Grandmaster Scrolls (1.5%), Lottery Machine (0.18%), Wishing (0.15%)
params.description:
On Aug 12, AD 1600, this mighty ship of the Caribbean Sea was put in a small bottle. 

Ship in a bottle, also known as the Black Pearl, is a four-masted vessel contained in a small bottle floating in the Caribbean Sea. It used to be a trade ship of the East India Company before becoming a pirate ship. Thereafter, it was cursed after the captain secretly released more than 200 captives. The captain and sailors would turn into immortal monsters every moonlit night. It was until this bottle showed  …
